prose.en: Implement replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for access to {param:ia-02.08_odp}.

guidance.en: Authentication processes resist replay attacks if it is impractical to achieve successful authentications by replaying previous authentication messages. Replay-resistant techniques include protocols that use nonces or challenges such as time synchronous or cryptographic authenticators.

prose.en: replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for access to {param:ia-02.08_odp} are implemented.

objects.en: procedures addressing user identification and authentication
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with system operations responsibilities
organizational personnel with account management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing identification and authentication capabilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing replay-resistant authentication mechanisms

nist-withdrawal.label: IA-02(09)
nist-withdrawal.title: Network Access to Non-privileged Accounts — Replay Resistant
